title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Wrogn Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Wrogn Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wrogn Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wrogn Advisory Limited:
Wrogn Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn Advisory Limited!
